meta.notes: Self-expanding query pool used by the weekly audit routine. Seeds are hand-curated from Meridian's services + suburbs. The routine re-checks each query against live search results every Saturday, harvests up to 5 new queries per run from Google autocomplete on the seeds that matter, and demotes queries that stop yielding useful signal. See docs/audit-dashboard-setup.md §6 for full routine prompt and self-expansion rules. 2026-05-29: autocomplete fetch (suggestqueries.google.com) is STILL blocked by the routine host egress allowlist — confirmed again this run via curl ('Host not in allowlist'). Workaround retained: pool self-expands via queries derived from previous-run SERP gaps (source: 'derived'). Durable fix = widen the routine egress allowlist to include suggestqueries.google.com and meridianosteopathy.co.nz. This run added 3 derived queries: 'rotator cuff osteopath christchurch' (surfaced inside shoulder-pain / frozen-shoulder SERPs — Better Health has a dedicated rotator-cuff URL), 'postnatal osteopath christchurch' (natural pairing with pregnancy-osteopath that we already track; Better Health has dedicated postnatal mention), 'chiropractor vs osteopath christchurch' (extension of this run's biggest movement — tracks whether the osteopath-vs-physio comparison-intent surfacing extends to chiropractor too). MILESTONE 2026-05-29: meridianosteopathy.co.nz climbed from non-aggregator position 5 → 3 for 'osteopath vs physiotherapist christchurch', overtaking christchurchosteopath.co.nz (Moorhouse) which slipped to #5. Second consecutive run with a tracked top-10 surfacing, and the first time we've out-ranked an NZ-side competitor on a tracked query. Priority bumped to 35 per the ≤3 rank rule.
